/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -o ../../local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/adios2/bindings/adios2_bindings.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11ADIOS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11Variable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11VariableDerived.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11Attribute.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11Operator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11Query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11glue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11ADIOSMPI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/adios2_py.dir/py11IOMPI.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jlx/Projects/CAESAR_ALL/ADIOS2/adios2-build/lib:/home/jlx/Projects/CAESAR_ALL/CAESAR_C/install/lib:/home/jlx/Software/miniforge3/envs/py311torch/lib/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib:/home/jlx/Software/nvcomp/lib:/usr/local/lib:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib: ../../lib/libadios2_cxx_mpi.so.2.11.0 ../../lib/libadios2_cxx.so.2.11.0 ../../lib/libadios2_core_mpi.so.2.11.0 ../../lib/libadios2_core.so.2.11.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/jlx/Projects/CAESAR_ALL/ADIOS2/adios2-build/lib:/home/jlx/Projects/CAESAR_ALL/CAESAR_C/install/lib:/home/jlx/Software/miniforge3/envs/py311torch/lib/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib:/home/jlx/Software/nvcomp/lib:/usr/local/lib
